nasb.text: But immediately Jesus spoke to them, saying, “Take courage, it is I; do not be afraid.”

esv.text: But immediately Jesus spoke to them, saying, “Take heart; it is I. Do not be afraid.”

cnv.text: 耶穌立刻對他們說：“放心吧！是我，不要怕。”

ccb.text: 耶稣立刻对他们说：“放心吧！是我，不要怕。”

csbs.text: 耶稣立刻对他们说：“鼓起勇气吧！是我，不要怕。”
